abilities.name: 복슬복슬
abilities.description: 상대로부터 받은 접촉하는 기술의 데미지를 반감시키지만 불꽃타입 기술의 데미지는 2배가 된다.

flavorTexts.text: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.
A lovingly mourned Pokémon was reborn as Houndstone. It doesn’t like anyone touching the protuberance atop its head.
